scene_prompt.description: The new Alice scene or action to render.

source_artifact_id.description: Preferred PopiArt artifact ID for the current Alice master reference.

reference_image_url.description: Stable Alice reference URL published by popiartServer for the current environment.

shot_type.description: Optional shot framing such as close-up, medium shot, or wide shot.

camera.description: Optional camera language such as eye level or slight low angle.

aspect_ratio.description: Portable framing hint such as 1:1, 16:9, or 9:16.

size.description: Optional exact runtime size when supported by the route.

retry_on_character_drift.description: Whether one retry is allowed when Alice drifts too far from the reference.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
